hook: In the UK, your therapy notes are 'special category' data — the most protected kind there is.
vo: UK GDPR puts mental-health information in a special category.
The law treats it as the most sensitive data there is.
Faresay is built to that standard — not above it, not below it.
Your records stay with you and your therapist.
onscreen_text: Faresay is built to that standard
Your records. Your therapist. Nobody else.
cta: Your records stay with you and your therapist. That's the idea.
broll_notes: Close-up of a locked padlock resting on a plain notebook, then a phone screen showing a simple, clean scheduling interface — no faces, no people, neutral desk setting.
